title: [CMake] Make circt tools optional
body:
## Motivation Since firtool does not depend on LLHD, and for lib downstreams, circt tools are not required either. We can make `LLHD` and circt tools optional to reduce the size of binaries and time of compilation.
with LLHD & circt tools ``` total 250M 18M circt-as* 6.7M circt-capi-ir-test* 18M circt-dis* 42M circt-lsp-server* 31M circt-opt* 15M circt-reduce* 10K circt-rtl-sim.py* 9.1M circt-translate* 3.0K driver.cpp 1.4K driver.sv 1.8K esi_cosim.py* 12K esi-cosim-runner.py* 5.3M esi-tester* 15M firtool* 5.9M handshake-runner* 19M hlstool* 68M llhd-sim* 862 py-split-input-file.py* ________________________________________________________ Executed in 101.86 secs fish external usr time 28.57 mins 1.27 millis 28.57 mins sys time 1.07 mins 0.00 millis 1.07 mins ```
without LLHD & circt tools ``` total 52M 6.7M circt-capi-ir-test* 1.8K esi_cosim.py* 12K esi-cosim-runner.py* 5.3M esi-tester* 15M firtool* 5.9M handshake-runner* 19M hlstool* 862 py-split-input-file.py* ________________________________________________________ Executed in 92.16 secs fish external usr time 25.62 mins 1.06 millis 25.62 mins sys time 0.92 mins 0.30 millis 0.92 mins ```
## Changes This PR introduces 2 new CMake options: `CIRCT_LLHD_ENABLED`, `CIRCT_TOOLS_DISABLE`. (The latter option is introduced because most circt tools depend on LLHD) It should not break any of the default behavior and everything should work as before, unless `-DCIRCT_LLHD_ENABLED=OFF -DCIRCT_LLHD_SIM_ENABLED=OFF -DCIRCT_TOOLS_DISABLE=ON` are explicitly passed to compile without LLHD. ## Unresolved issues - Currently `check-circt` is broken if compiled without LLHD. I tried modifying `lit.cfg.py` and `lit.site.cfg.py.in`, but the tests still don't seem to be skipped. Any hints would be appreciated. - Documentation updates. (TODO)
